datasets.name: S&P 500 Proxy Daily OHLCV
datasets.description: Cleaned daily OHLCV bars representing a broad-market US equity proxy.

versions.source: Public market data sample derived from educational use feeds
preprocessingSteps: Forward-filled missing close values and recalculated open/high/low consistency checks
versions.missingValuesHandled: Forward-fill for close; rows with missing date removed

datasets.name: BTC-USD Daily OHLCV
datasets.description: Deterministic crypto sample for momentum and risk metric tutorials.

versions.source: Aggregated exchange candles for educational usage
preprocessingSteps: Dropped rows with zero volume anomalies
Winsorized high/low outliers at 1st and 99th percentile
Validated OHLC constraints (high >= open/close, low <= open/close)
versions.missingValuesHandled: Linear interpolation for single-day gaps; multi-day gaps excluded

datasets.name: US CPI Monthly Index
datasets.description: Consumer Price Index sample aligned for macro trend analysis.

versions.source: FRED CPIAUCSL transformed for educational use
preprocessingSteps: Converted period labels to first day of month
Backfilled missing points from neighboring months
Calculated synthetic OHLC bars from monthly level index
Stored deterministic volume placeholder for schema compatibility
versions.missingValuesHandled: Backfill and forward-fill at monthly frequency
